publishedAbstract: * When using OpenShift Data Foundation (ODF) with the Local Storage Operator (LSO), OSD persistent volumes get bad symlinks that refer to `google-` prefixed devices on the nodes * OSD pods are in a `Pending` or `CrashLoopBackOff` state
publishedTitle: OSD pods go offline due to bad 'google-' symlinks when using ODF with LSO
